jokes.text: my t-shirt is missing the 'with'
jokes.setup: David notices his bachelor party shirt has missing text
jokes.punchline: The pedantic observation about improper grammar on what should be a fun shirt
jokes.explanation: Classic David - finding grammatical issues with something meant to be fun. Strong character integration.

jokes.text: Oh, no, I had yours custom-made.
jokes.setup: David complaining about the shirt's grammar
jokes.punchline: Stevie's deadpan delivery that she intentionally made it wrong
jokes.explanation: Perfect Stevie deadpan trolling. Excellent economy and character voice.

jokes.text: putting me in charge of your joint bachelor party was a big mistake, right?
jokes.setup: Stevie acknowledging her role as party planner
jokes.punchline: Pre-emptively admitting failure before revealing plans
jokes.explanation: Good character beat showing Stevie's self-aware pessimism.

jokes.text: David sent me a seven-page e-mail with the subject line, 'The Bachelor Party of My Dreams'
jokes.setup: David and Patrick claiming they never asked for anything specific
jokes.punchline: Revealing David's incredibly detailed and dramatic email
jokes.explanation: Perfect David characterization - overthinking a simple request with dramatic flair.

jokes.text: Wow, that's bleak.
jokes.setup: Stevie describing elegant appetizers at the Wobbly Elm
jokes.punchline: David's instant, harsh assessment delivered matter-of-factly
jokes.explanation: Sharp, economical putdown. Classic David honesty delivered with perfect timing.

jokes.text: isn't that a Jodie Foster movie?
jokes.setup: Stevie announcing an escape room experience
jokes.punchline: David confusing it with Panic Room
jokes.explanation: Shows David's pop culture knowledge filtered through his anxiety about activities.

jokes.text: You lost me at fun group game.
jokes.setup: Patrick explaining escape rooms as fun group games
jokes.punchline: David immediately rejecting the concept at its most basic level
jokes.explanation: Perfect David line - rejecting group activities with characteristic bluntness. Highly quotable.

jokes.text: Your family hasn't responded to a single email, so they will be doing what we tell them to do.
jokes.setup: David asking if his family agreed to this
jokes.punchline: Stevie's practical acknowledgment that non-response equals compliance
jokes.explanation: Good insight into family dynamics and Stevie's no-nonsense approach.

jokes.text: Dramatic effect. Symbolism.
jokes.setup: Being asked why she demanded a diamond tennis bracelet
jokes.punchline: Moira's pretentious justification for material demands
jokes.explanation: Classic Moira - turning greed into artistic statement.

jokes.text: when one door closes, the floodgates open
jokes.setup: Discussing missed opportunities
jokes.punchline: Moira mixing metaphors in characteristically dramatic fashion
jokes.explanation: Perfect Moira malapropism - confident delivery of mangled wisdom.

jokes.text: Radio, yes. Voiceover work is every actor's dream.
jokes.setup: Twyla's excitement about Moira being in a commercial
jokes.punchline: Moira spinning radio work as prestigious when it's clearly a step down
jokes.explanation: Shows Moira's ability to reframe career decline as artistic choice.

jokes.text: you're not waiting on a famous person. She's already arrived!
jokes.setup: Twyla saying she feels like she's waiting on a famous person
jokes.punchline: Moira's dramatic self-proclamation of fame
jokes.explanation: Pure Moira ego and theatrical delivery.

jokes.text: I got a hot little BLT over at the café and I don't wanna keep her waitin'.
jokes.setup: Roland being called away from potential business news
jokes.punchline: Personifying his sandwich as a romantic interest
jokes.explanation: Typical Roland - crude humor that fits his character.

jokes.text: Well, they haven't heard the idea yet.
jokes.setup: Family getting excited about potential investor interest
jokes.punchline: Johnny revealing the 'interest' is based on nothing concrete
jokes.explanation: Good deflation of excitement - shows Johnny's tendency to get ahead of himself.

jokes.text: I'm pretty sure I can keep this one to myself.
jokes.setup: Johnny asking them to keep potential investor news secret
jokes.punchline: Stevie's dry response to keeping non-news secret
jokes.explanation: Classic Stevie sarcasm - perfect delivery of skepticism.

jokes.text: if the local papers ask me about the rumour that you might be getting a phone call...
jokes.setup: Johnny's request for secrecy about the potential investor
jokes.punchline: Roland mockingly escalating the non-story to absurd proportions
jokes.explanation: Good absurdist escalation that deflates Johnny's self-importance.

jokes.text: What could have possibly distracted you enough to do that to yourself?
jokes.setup: Alexis wearing sweatpants
jokes.punchline: David's horror at the fashion choice framed as self-harm
jokes.explanation: Perfect David fashion snobbery - treating style as life-or-death.

jokes.text: if you're talking about your style, we can bring it back to life.
jokes.setup: Alexis saying 'it died'
jokes.punchline: David assuming she means her style and offering resurrection
jokes.explanation: Good character beat showing David's priorities and misunderstanding.

jokes.text: I would argue that you still have your memories.
jokes.setup: Alexis mourning her dead plant as the one thing left from her relationship
jokes.punchline: David's practical correction that memories still exist
jokes.explanation: Good sibling dynamic - David being logical while Alexis is dramatic.

jokes.text: there is only space in this family for one unstable sibling, and I have held that title for a very long time
jokes.setup: Alexis being depressed and unmotivated
jokes.punchline: David claiming territorial rights over being the family mess
jokes.explanation: Excellent self-aware character comedy. David acknowledging his role with pride. Highly quotable.

jokes.text: Jo Foster once screened it for me privately and I would like to keep that memory safe.
jokes.setup: David correcting that it's an escape room, not Panic Room
jokes.punchline: Moira's casual name-drop about private screening with 'Jo Foster'
jokes.explanation: Classic Moira casual celebrity name-dropping with possessive familiarity.

jokes.text: It's an escape room followed by a really sad reception
jokes.setup: David corrects Moira about the evening's activities
jokes.punchline: His brutally honest description of his own bachelor party
jokes.explanation: David's self-deprecating honesty about how disappointing his own party is

jokes.text: You're waiting on a call from him, too?
jokes.setup: Johnny corrects Roland about the name being Mike, not Ike
jokes.punchline: Roland thinks there are two different people calling
jokes.explanation: Roland's confusion creates additional chaos around the already missed call

jokes.text: You mean Mike Morrison. / You're waiting on a call from him, too?
jokes.setup: Johnny correcting Roland about the name
jokes.punchline: Roland revealing he took a call from Mike Morrison
jokes.explanation: Good setup for the missed call revelation - builds tension well.

jokes.text: Mike Morrison called?!
jokes.setup: Roland reveals someone called
jokes.punchline: Johnny's horrified realization he missed the important call
jokes.explanation: Johnny's panic upon learning his big break called while Roland was confused about names

jokes.text: Uh, Johnny Rose calling you back. Uh, bye.
jokes.setup: Johnny trying to leave a professional voicemail
jokes.punchline: Awkward, repetitive message showing his nervousness
jokes.explanation: Good cringe moment showing Johnny's anxiety affecting his professionalism.

jokes.text: I don't think you mentioned your name.
jokes.setup: Johnny asking how his voicemail sounded
jokes.punchline: Stevie pointing out the obvious flaw after saying it was fine
jokes.explanation: Classic Stevie - delivering harsh truth with perfect deadpan timing.

jokes.text: Well, there'll be nothing flat about my performance.
jokes.setup: Producer mentioning flat rate payment
jokes.punchline: Moira's theatrical pun about her performance being anything but flat
jokes.explanation: Typical Moira wordplay - turning business talk into theatrical flourish.

jokes.text: Oh, that's a touch uninspired. Alexis?
jokes.setup: Reading terrible Larry Air copy
jokes.punchline: Moira's artistic critique of objectively bad advertising copy
jokes.explanation: Shows Moira's inability to just read copy without artistic judgment.

jokes.text: I haven't showered in like two days. Is this the lowest point of my life?
jokes.setup: Moira asking if this radio job is her lowest point
jokes.punchline: Alexis one-upping with her own rock bottom revelation
jokes.explanation: Good escalation showing both characters at their low points.

jokes.text: Is anyone else not getting a signal in here?
jokes.setup: Family gathering for bachelor party introductions
jokes.punchline: Johnny immediately focused on his phone instead of the occasion
jokes.explanation: Shows Johnny's obsession with the potential business call.

jokes.text: how 'bout you shh for a sec
jokes.setup: David suggesting they split up instead of doing the escape room
jokes.punchline: Stevie's blunt dismissal of his attempt to avoid the activity
jokes.explanation: Perfect Stevie - cutting through David's complaints with maternal authority.

jokes.text: how about half of us do the escape room, and then the other half of us get a table at the bar?
jokes.setup: The family is reluctant about the escape room
jokes.punchline: David tries to negotiate out of the activity entirely
jokes.explanation: David's attempt to split the difference and avoid the group activity

jokes.text: for some reason, thinks this is gonna be... fun!
jokes.setup: David explains they have to do this for Patrick
jokes.punchline: He can't even say 'fun' without sarcasm
jokes.explanation: David's inability to comprehend how anyone could find this enjoyable

jokes.text: Well, I'm sure I speak for all of us when I say I hope we escape very quickly.
jokes.setup: Patrick explaining the family tradition and hoping they enjoy it
jokes.punchline: Johnny's polite but honest desire to get it over with
jokes.explanation: Good diplomatic honesty from Johnny - polite but transparent.

jokes.text: This is a Galapagos-themed room!
jokes.setup: Learning the escape room theme after earlier talk about missing the Galapagos trip
jokes.punchline: Alexis recognizing the cosmic irony
jokes.explanation: Nice callback connecting her missed opportunity to the current situation.

jokes.text: What?!
jokes.setup: The game mentions the Galapagos Islands
jokes.punchline: Alexis's shocked reaction to the coincidence
jokes.explanation: Alexis's dramatic reaction to the universe seemingly sending her a sign

jokes.text: Don't worry, I'm also in the Guild.
jokes.setup: David demanding the escape room assistant show them the exit
jokes.punchline: Moira treating it like a professional actor situation
jokes.explanation: Classic Moira - applying theatrical logic to everyday situations.

jokes.text: Like, some people's minds just don't work like this.
jokes.setup: Johnny explains why he doesn't like mind games
jokes.punchline: He continues rationalizing his poor performance
jokes.explanation: Continuation of Johnny's defensive explanations

jokes.text: I did tell you to wear sensible heels today, and I'm not sure this outfit is entirely appropriate.
jokes.setup: Alexis says maybe she made a mistake
jokes.punchline: David thinks she means her outfit choice, not life decisions
jokes.explanation: Classic David - focusing on fashion when Alexis is having an existential crisis

jokes.text: Trust me, Stavros and I used to make out in his parents' aviary.
jokes.setup: Spotting a finch for the puzzle
jokes.punchline: Revealing her bird knowledge comes from romantic escapades
jokes.explanation: Perfect Alexis - her random expertise always traces back to romantic adventures.

jokes.text: No, the finch. Second row, in the middle.
jokes.setup: David asking where she wants to be in life
jokes.punchline: Alexis redirecting to the puzzle while having an existential crisis
jokes.explanation: Great comedic timing - deflecting deep conversation to focus on the task.

jokes.text: Blow harder, David! / Oh my God, you blow on them! You blow on the circles then!
jokes.setup: David struggling with the puzzle mechanism
jokes.punchline: Siblings arguing about technique under pressure
jokes.explanation: Good sibling dynamic under stress - shows their relationship.

jokes.text: You're only saying that because you got one right!
jokes.setup: Alexis says the game is fun
jokes.punchline: David calls out her motivation for the opinion change
jokes.explanation: David's cynical but accurate reading of why Alexis changed her tune

jokes.text: You can use my phone, John! / You still have your phone?! / We all have our phones!
jokes.setup: Johnny desperate to check for the important call
jokes.punchline: Revealing everyone kept their phones despite the rules
jokes.explanation: Good revelation that deflates the escape room premise.

jokes.text: Candle.
jokes.setup: Complex riddle about being tall when young and short when old
jokes.punchline: Alexis instantly solving it with casual confidence
jokes.explanation: Shows Alexis's surprising competence with perfect economy.

jokes.text: My friend Prairie got one tattooed on her lower-back in seventh grade.
jokes.setup: Identifying an ancient Egyptian symbol
jokes.punchline: Her knowledge source is a friend's questionable tattoo choice
jokes.explanation: Perfect Alexis - random cultural knowledge from unlikely sources.

jokes.text: I have something... / Hi, just reminding you that you can't bail on the escape room thing, even though all of us want... / I actually wanna hear that one.
jokes.setup: Playing voicemails trying to find the investor call
jokes.punchline: David wanting to hear his own message about everyone wanting to bail
jokes.explanation: Good self-aware moment - David enjoying his own honesty.

jokes.text: So, for someone who is all about signs, what do you think it meant that you were the one that got us out of the Galapagos?
jokes.setup: Alexis being the key to solving the escape room
jokes.punchline: David pointing out the irony given her earlier travel dilemma
jokes.explanation: Excellent callback that ties together the episode's themes.

jokes.text: being in a high-pressure situation, with time running out and a lot of people yelling at me, it just like... made me feel like myself again.
jokes.setup: David asking what the escape room success meant
jokes.punchline: Alexis realizing chaos and pressure are her natural element
jokes.explanation: Brilliant character insight - Alexis thriving in chaos makes perfect sense.

jokes.text: No, I watched you slowly kill it.
jokes.setup: Alexis wonders if the plant died because it outgrew its pot
jokes.punchline: David's blunt dismissal of her metaphor
jokes.explanation: Perfect David - cutting through Alexis's romanticizing with harsh reality

jokes.text: I was tracking the metaphor
jokes.setup: Alexis comparing herself to the dead plant needing a bigger pot
jokes.punchline: David's dry acknowledgment of the obvious symbolism
jokes.explanation: Perfect David - acknowledging the obvious with characteristic dryness.

jokes.text: I was tracking the metaphor
jokes.setup: Alexis compares herself to the plant
jokes.punchline: David acknowledges he understood but wants her to be direct
jokes.explanation: David's literary awareness and impatience with indirect communication

jokes.text: with his pecuniary savvy and intrepidation has turned what began as a katzenjammer of a day
jokes.setup: Moira giving a speech about Johnny's business success
jokes.punchline: Her characteristic use of unnecessarily complex vocabulary
jokes.explanation: Classic Moira vocabulary showing - 'katzenjammer' is perfectly pretentious.

jokes.text: Well, we did say no speeches, so... / Guess they listened.
jokes.setup: Moira launching into an elaborate speech
jokes.punchline: David pointing out they specifically asked for no speeches
jokes.explanation: Good family dynamic - the futility of controlling Moira.

jokes.text: Well, we did say no speeches, so...
jokes.setup: Moira starts giving a formal speech
jokes.punchline: David tries to shut it down immediately
jokes.explanation: David's attempt to enforce the no-speeches rule against his dramatic mother

jokes.text: whoever chose those photos, they were not approved.
jokes.setup: David tries to wrap up the bachelor party
jokes.punchline: He immediately nitpicks the photo choices
jokes.explanation: David can't help but criticize even at his own bachelor party
